response.justification: While the candidate brings over 15 years of software engineering experience and strong TypeScript skills, they fall significantly short of the core requirement for 8+ years of experience building AI-driven solutions. Their exposure to GenAI, agentic workflows, and Model Context Protocol (MCP) is highly relevant but appears limited to their most recent role. Furthermore, the absence of Python, RAG, and vector database experience makes them a poor overall fit for this specialized Staff Forward Deployed Engineer position.
strengths: Over 15 years of software engineering experience, including Staff-level and technical leadership roles.
Strong proficiency in TypeScript and modern cloud deployments, including AWS CDK and Kubernetes.
Recent, highly relevant hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure, agentic workflows, and Model Context Protocol (MCP).
concerns: Falls significantly short of the required 8+ years of experience specifically building AI-driven solutions.
Lacks demonstrable experience with Python, vector databases, and RAG architectures, which are core to the tech stack.
GenAI and LLM integration experience is limited to a single, very recent position.
